reviews.author: Scott Alan Hardy
reviews.text:
The speed and quality was unbelievable. We waited a while to do this review because we wanted to make sure that everything settled down. We chose a light gray with specks and the impressive thing was how they went and did the steps and they went up the wall to the sheet rock.

A few other bids, they were much more expensive. They didn’t include going up the wall or doing the step into the house overall I wouldn’t say anyone compares to the quality speed and effectiveness of an Epoxy Garage Guy at of Murrieta.

Our home is a custom build and needs to be top notch in all areas and unfortunately, the concrete around the garage floor entrance wasn’t up to par. They were able to patch it and smooth it all out where you don’t even notice it anymore.

Highly recommend them.

We influence over 12,000 homebuyers every year and we wanted to find someone that we could refer to our clients the Epoxy Garage Guy is that group!

reviews.author: Sophie Tsai
reviews.text:
Jen and Stacey were amazing! Super friendly, punctual, and they got straight to work. The floors were already looking great the first night, and they came back the next day to finish the top coat. We couldn’t be happier with how our epoxy floors turned out—it’s a complete transformation (check out the before & after pictures). They also gave us a great tip to place a mat under the refrigerator to protect the floors from any leaks.

It’s been a few weeks now, and after parking our cars on the floor, it still looks as perfect as the day they finished. Their pricing is very competitive, and the lifetime warranty is such a bonus. We would highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Jeanelle S
reviews.text: Highly recommend for your garage epoxy needs! Friendly crew and great quality work. After doing tons of research and getting lots of crazy quotes of up to $3-4k for a standard 2 car garage, these guys were the most reasonably priced with their web promotion at $1599 (plus tax). They were quick to respond and scheduled the 2 day job within a week after contacting them. Thank you Steven, Angelo, Alex, Cody! Sorry I didn’t catch the names of the other guys who came the second day for the top coat. Our garage looks awesome! :) I also really appreciate that they came back a couple times and patched up a few imperfections we noticed.  Thanks again! Love how it turned out! Will def be referring to our neighbors and friends.

reviews.author: Hebert Family
reviews.text: I absolutely LOVE our garage floors! Their crew was punctual, super friendly, communicated well and did a beautiful job. Their pricing was unbeatable and I am so happy with the final product!

reviews.author: Chris Kladouras
reviews.text: From the start, Mike and his team were very informative on the entire process. Communication was professional, work was precise, and in a timely manner. Would 100% use them again !!! No nonsense Rock solid company
